stemHtml: Ohm's law states that in an electric circuit…

options.a: the voltage passing through a resistor between two points is proportional to the current between those two points.
options.b: the current passing through a resistor between two points is proportional to the voltage between those two points.
options.c: the voltage passing through a resistor between two points is inversely proportional to the resistance between those two points.
options.d: the current passing through a resistor between two points is proportional to the resistance between those two points.
